name: rhf-advanced-03
title: Validated Table Filters
description: Filter an orders table through a validated search, status and amount form.

files.content:
'use client' import { useState } from 'react' import { Controller, useForm } from 'react-hook-form' import { zodResolver } from '@hookform/resolvers/zod' import { SearchIcon, SearchXIcon } from 'lucide-react' import * as z from 'zod' import { Badge } from '@/components/ui/badge' import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button' import { Card, CardContent, CardDescription, CardHeader, CardTitle, } from '@/components/ui/card' import { Empty, EmptyDescription, EmptyHeader, EmptyMedia, EmptyTitle, } from '@/components/ui/empty' import { Field, FieldError, FieldLabel } from '@/components/ui/field' import { Input } from '@/components/ui/input' import { Select, SelectContent, SelectGroup, SelectItem, SelectLabel, SelectTrigger, SelectValue, } from '@/components/ui/select' import { Table, TableBody, TableCell, TableHead, TableHeader, TableRow, } from '@/components/ui/table' type OrderStatus = 'paid' | 'pending' | 'refunded' type Order = { id: string customer: string status: OrderStatus amount: number } const ORDERS: Order[] = [ { id: 'INV-1001', customer: 'Acme Inc.', status: 'paid', amount: 1200 }, { id: 'INV-1002', customer: 'Globex', status: 'pending', amount: 340 }, { id: 'INV-1003', customer: 'Initech', status: 'refunded', amount: 90 }, { id: 'INV-1004', customer: 'Umbrella Co.', status: 'paid', amount: 5400 }, { id: 'INV-1005', customer: 'Hooli', status: 'pending', amount: 760 }, ] const statusVariant: Record = { paid: 'default', pending: 'outline', refunded: 'destructive', } const filterSchema = z.object({ query: z.string(), status: z.enum(['all', 'paid', 'pending', 'refunded']), minAmount: z .string() .refine( (v) => v === '' || (!Number.isNaN(Number(v)) && Number(v) >= 0), 'Enter a non-negative number.', ), }) type FilterValues = z.infer function applyFilters({ query, status, minAmount }: FilterValues): Order[] { const q = query.trim().toLowerCase() const min = minAmount === '' ? 0 : Number(minAmount) return ORDERS.filter((order) => { const matchesQuery = q === '' || order.id.toLowerCase().includes(q) || order.customer.toLowerCase().includes(q) const matchesStatus = status === 'all' || order.status === status return matchesQuery && matchesStatus && order.amount >= min }) } export function RhfAdvanced03() { const form = useForm({ resolver: zodResolver(filterSchema), defaultValues: { query: '', status: 'all', minAmount: '' }, }) const { errors } = form.formState const [results, setResults] = useState(ORDERS) function onSubmit(data: FilterValues) { setResults(applyFilters(data)) } return ( Orders Filter the table below — the minimum amount is validated on search.
Search ( Status )} /> Min $ {errors.minAmount && } {results.length === 0 ? ( No matching orders Try lowering the minimum or clearing the search. ) : (
Invoice Customer Status Amount {results.map((order) => ( {order.id} {order.customer} {order.status} ${order.amount.toLocaleString()} ))}
)}

{results.length} of {ORDERS.length} orders

) }
